article_title: Enforcement of Liens on Apportioned Fleet Vehicles

markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 4. Permits to Nonresident Owners [6700 - 8204]
#### Article 6. Enforcement of Liens on Apportioned Fleet Vehicles [8200 - 8204]
##### § 8200

“Registrant,” for purposes of this article, means any person issued apportioned fleet registration pursuant to Article 4 (commencing with Section 8050).

*(Amended by Stats. 1996, Ch. 124, Sec. 120. Effective January 1, 1997.)*
